mapper.select: SELECT TID, LIB_CODE, PUSH_TYPE, PUSH_MSG, PUSH_URL, PUSH_STATUS, PUSH_RESERVE_DATE, PUSH_REGDATE, PUSH_MODDATE, PUSH_REG_ID, PUSH_REG_NM, PUSH_REG_IP, PUSH_MOD_ID, PUSH_MOD_NM, PUSH_MOD_IP, PUSH_TARGET FROM gbesearch.CHT_PUSHMANAGE_TBL WHERE TID = #{tid}
mapper.update: UPDATE gbesearch.CHT_PUSHMANAGE_TBL SET LIB_CODE = #{lib_code}, PUSH_TYPE = #{push_type}, PUSH_MSG = #{push_msg}, PUSH_URL = #{push_url}, PUSH_RESERVE_DATE = #{push_reserve_date}, PUSH_MODDATE = SYSDATE, PUSH_MOD_ID = #{push_mod_id}, PUSH_MOD_NM = #{push_mod_nm}, PUSH_MOD_IP = #{push_mod_ip}, PUSH_STATUS = #{push_status} WHERE TID = #{tid}
UPDATE gbesearch.CHT_PUSHMANAGE_TBL SET PUSH_URL = '' WHERE TID = #{tid}
